inst_welcome_text_1:
Welcome to this experiment. 
 
 Please read the following instructions carefully.
inst_text_ver_1: In the next screen, you will see two dots jumping up and down
inst_text_hor_1: Now they will jump from left to right.
inst_text_amb_1: If they jump at different times, you can see either up-down or left-right motion.
inst_text_mml_1: In the next screen, the distance of the dots will vary over time
inst_text_mml_2: If you watch closely, you will notice that first, the dots seem to jump up and down. Later they will likely seem to jump from left to right.
inst_text_mml_3: If the spacing is very narrow at first, you will likely see left-right motion at first and up-down motion later.
exp_text_1: Now its time to start with the actual experiment.
exp_text_2: You will now see an entire row of the jumping dots.
exp_text_3: The first few jumps can determine how you see the dots moving for a certain time.
exp_text_4: If all dots jump up and down a few times before they start jumping seprarately, it can influence the how you see them move.
exp_text_5: In the next screen you will likely see all dots move up and down for a while.
exp_text_6: Now you will likely see them move from left to right.
exp_text_7: At some point, the direction might switch spontaneously.
exp_text_8: From now on focus on the center of the screen and try to keep your gaze on the fixation cross.
exp_text_start_trial: Please press space as soon as the center one changes direction.
exp_break_text_1:
Time for a short break. 
 Press space to continue when you are ready.
exp_complete_text:
Thank you for participating! 
 Please press SPACE to finish and inform the experimenter about the completion.
